agent.status: Did a full sweep for spots where users get stuck or confused before we open to everyone. Found a bunch; now fixing them one at a time. First up: email confirmation was silently breaking for some people because spam-filter link scanners were using up the one-time confirm link before the person could click it.
agent.direction: Working down the list - password reset, friendlier error pages, letting people fix a mistyped email, and a way back in after opting out
